meta.title: GPT Image 1.5 AI Image Generator | OpenAI | OpenCreator
meta.description: Create stunning images with GPT Image 1.5 from OpenAI. 4x faster generation, precise editing, stronger instruction following, and improved text rendering. Try free on OpenCreator.

hero.description: GPT Image 1.5 is OpenAI's newest flagship image generation model, delivering 4x faster creation speeds, precise editing capabilities, and stronger instruction following. Perfect for iterative creative workflows and professional image production.

speed.title: 4x Faster Generation
speed.description: Generate images up to four times faster than previous models, enabling rapid iteration and efficient creative workflows.

editing.title: Precise Editing
editing.description: Add or remove objects, change visual styles, adjust clothing, and refine specific areas without regenerating the entire image.

instruction.title: Stronger Instruction Following
instruction.description: Enhanced ability to follow complex prompts accurately, especially during iterative edits for consistent results.

text.title: Improved Text Rendering
text.description: Generate more legible text inside images, addressing a long-standing challenge in AI image generation.

detail.title: Detail Preservation
detail.description: Maintains fine details and quality during edits, ensuring professional-grade output for commercial use.

versatile.title: Versatile Styles
versatile.description: Support for diverse visual styles from photorealistic to artistic, with preset filters and trending designs.

0.question: What is GPT Image 1.5 and who developed it?
0.answer: GPT Image 1.5 is OpenAI's newest flagship image generation model, released in December 2025. It delivers 4x faster generation speeds, precise editing capabilities, and stronger instruction following compared to previous models.

1.question: What types of content can I create with GPT Image 1.5?
1.answer: GPT Image 1.5 excels at creating product photography, marketing visuals, portraits, poster designs, social media content, and image editing. It supports diverse visual styles from photorealistic to artistic.

2.question: How fast is GPT Image 1.5?
2.answer: GPT Image 1.5 runs up to 4x faster than its predecessor, enabling rapid iteration and efficient creative workflows for professional use.

3.question: Can GPT Image 1.5 render text in images?
3.answer: Yes! GPT Image 1.5 has significantly improved text rendering capabilities, producing more legible text inside images. This addresses a long-standing challenge in AI image generation.

4.question: What editing capabilities does GPT Image 1.5 have?
4.answer: GPT Image 1.5 supports precise editing including adding or removing objects, changing visual styles, adjusting clothing, and refining specific areas without regenerating the entire image.

5.question: How does GPT Image 1.5 compare to other AI image models?
5.answer: GPT Image 1.5 stands out for its speed (4x faster), precise editing capabilities, and strong instruction following. While models like Nano Banana Pro offer different strengths, GPT Image 1.5 excels in iterative creative workflows.
